name: Crime Junkie
tagline: Concise true crime stories you can binge in one sitting
description:
Crime Junkie is a weekly true crime podcast hosted by Ashley Flowers that delivers in-depth explorations of a different criminal case each episode. It functions as a thoroughly researched narrative source, transforming complex police investigations, trials, and victim stories into a structured and easy-to-follow audio format. The show is designed for true crime enthusiasts, casual listeners seeking engaging stories, and anyone interested in the procedural and human elements of real-life cases. Its main benefit is providing a reliable, consistently high-quality dose of true crime content that is both informative and respectfully presented.

Key features include its strict weekly schedule, ensuring listeners have a regular true crime fix to anticipate. The presentation is a standout, with Ashley Flowers delivering detailed research in a clear, conversational tone that builds suspense while maintaining clarity. Furthermore, the podcast often highlights lesser-known cases and includes updates on older episodes when new information emerges.

A typical use case is a listener during their daily commute or while doing household chores. They can immerse themselves in a single, complete story—from the initial crime and investigation to the resolution and broader implications—arriving at their destination or finishing a task feeling both entertained and more knowledgeable about the case.
seoTitle: Crime Junkie: Must-Listen True Crime Podcast of 2026
seoDescription: Dive into chilling true crime tales that will keep you hooked. Discover what makes Crime Junkie a binge-worthy favorite! Tune in now!
